message:
feat(tui): Add V key pressure overlay to HelpOverlay and AnalysisMenu

HelpOverlay.tsx:
- Add V key entry to overlayRows (quick overlays section)
- Description: "Packaging pressure gauge"
- Note: "force / atm" (indicates physics displayed)
- Placed after GC skew (G) for logical grouping

MenuOverlays.tsx (AnalysisMenuOverlay):
- Add 'analysis-pressure' menu item in Analysis category
- Label: "Packaging Pressure Gauge"
- Description: "Packaging motor pressure vs fill fraction (V)"
- Icon: 📦 (package/box emoji - appropriate for DNA packaging)
- Shortcut: V
- Action: openOverlay('pressure')
- Gated by experience level (inside intermediate+ conditional)

This completes the pressure overlay integration across all discovery
surfaces - users can find it via:
1. Direct V key press (with experience gating)
2. Help overlay (?) reference
3. Analysis menu (A key) browsing

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -48,6 +48,7 @@ export function HelpOverlay(): React.ReactElement {
   const overlayRows: HelpRow[] = [
     { key: 'X', desc: 'Sequence complexity (entropy)', note: 'HGT / repeats' },
     { key: 'G', desc: 'GC skew overlay', note: 'origin / terminus' },
+    { key: 'V', desc: 'Packaging pressure gauge', note: 'force / atm' },
     { key: 'B', desc: 'DNA bendability (AT proxy)' },
     { key: 'J', desc: 'K-mer anomaly map', note: 'local composition shifts' },
     { key: 'L', desc: 'Module coherence / stoichiometry', note: 'capsid/tail/lysis' },

           },

+            action: () => openOverlay('pressure'),
+          },
